reviews.comment:
Mucha cola para cargar nafta.para tomar un café igual.1 sola persona atendiendo.y solo efectivo porque no tenían Internet en ese momento

(Translated by Google)
Long lines to get gas. Same for coffee. Only one person serving. And cash only because they didn't have internet at the time.
